bills.title: Expressing support for the recognition of "Hidradenitis Suppurativa Awareness Week".

bills.title: Recognizing the significance of Sjögren's disease as a serious and systemic autoimmune disease and expressing support for the designation of April 2025 as "Sjögren's Awareness Month".

bills.title: Supporting the designation of March as "Autoimmune Awareness Month" and supporting efforts to increase awareness of autoimmune diseases and increase funding for autoimmune disease research.
bills.latestActionText: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
